name: Raspberry-Walnut Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 1 cup fresh or frozen raspberries, coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
For crust: Mix all ingredients until a dough forms. Press the dough into the bottom of an ungreased 9-inch springform pan. Bake at 400°F for 10 to 12 minutes, or until the edges are golden brown. Cool.
Reduce oven temperature to 325°F and bake the crust. Beat cream cheese, sugar, flour, and vanilla extract in a large bowl on low speed until fluffy. Add eggs one at a time, mixing on medium speed for 1 minute after each addition, scraping the bowl occasionally. Fold in raspberries and pour the mixture over the cooled crust.
Bake for about 55 minutes, or until the center is set. Let cool for 30 minutes on a wire rack. Refrigerate for at least 3 hours before removing the side of the pan.
